repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: AGREE cannot reference component features directly by name from thread implementation annex -> Replace 'Data_Sink' with 'Q.Impl.Data_Sink' to reference the port through the implementation
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: AGREE cannot reference subcomponents directly by name from thread implementation annex -> Replace 'Q_Spg' with 'Q.Impl.Q_Spg' to reference the subcomponent through the implementation
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE cannot reference properties directly by name from thread implementation annex -> Replace 'Dispatch_Protocol' with 'Q.Impl.Dispatch_Protocol' to reference the property through the implementation
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE cannot reference component implementation names directly in property expressions -> Replace 'Impl' with 'Q.Impl' to reference the implementation directly
line 67: mismatched input '"period_ms"' expecting RULE_ID: AGREE constant declarations require unquoted identifiers -> Remove quotes from 'period_ms' to make it a valid identifier

line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Data_Sink' as a valid expression in the context of Q.Impl -> Replace 'Q.Impl.Data_Sink' with just 'Data_Sink' since it's already in the scope of the component implementation
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Impl' as a valid identifier in the context of Q.Impl -> Remove 'Q.Impl.' prefix from 'Data_Sink' and 'Q_Spg.Data_Sink' to use only visible symbols
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Q_Spg' as a valid expression in the context of Q.Impl -> Replace 'Q_Spg.Data_Sink' with 'Data_Sink' since the connection is already established via P1
line 65: named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE requires both sides of an equality to be valid expressions with types -> Rewrite the signal flow assumption to compare the port directly with itself or remove the invalid assumption
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Dispatch_Protocol' as a valid expression in the context of Q.Impl -> Replace 'Q.Impl.Dispatch_Protocol' with 'Dispatch_Protocol' to reference the property directly

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex is in component type scope but references property from component implementation -> Move the AGREE annex block to the component implementation Q.Impl

line 79: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: assume statement in thread implementation annex -> move the assume statement to the component type Q annex
line 79: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol': property name not visible in implementation context -> remove the assume statement referencing Dispatch_Protocol

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex is referencing a property name that is not visible in the annex context -> Change 'Dispatch_Protocol' to 'Q.Impl.Dispatch_Protocol' to reference the property on the implementation
